rationale: Start from the gene, enumerate variants, narrow to a mutation class, then confirm disease literature.

ladder.what_it_gives: The gene card and related variant/literature pivots.
A catalog of variants for the gene.
A narrowed search for the mutation of interest.

ladder.command: biomcp search article -g PLN -d cardiomyopathy --type review --limit 10
ladder.what_it_gives: Review literature connecting the gene, variants, and disease.
